appSubtitle: The Next Generation of Native Android Streaming
statusMessage: Server Upgrading: We are integrating Server 2 for 4K streaming. Expected back online at 6:00 PM.
currentFeatures: HD Streaming (Server 1), Secure Beta Login, Dynamic Movie Slider, Ad-Free UI
upcoming: Live TV Integration, 4K HDR Support, Multi-Server Switching, Watch Party Beta
about: Moviestream Pro is an elite, high-performance media delivery platform engineered for the modern Android ecosystem. Built using native development practices, the application bypasses standard web-view bottlenecks to provide low-latency playback and superior buffer management. With a focus on high-bitrate HD delivery and a clean, minimalist interface, Moviestream Pro provides a reliable, cinematic experience optimized for high-bandwidth mobile devices.
